From our sister site, roadmap.sh

AI and Data Scientist Roadmap

Mastering the transition from data to intelligence requires a clear path through the noise of modern AI. This roadmap provides a  step-by-step guide to evolving from a traditional data analyst into a high-impact AI Data Scientist.

  • Complete Lifecycle: Covers everything from foundational math and Python to advanced Deep Learning.

  • Modern AI Stack: Includes specialized tracks for AI Engineering and Vibe Coding.

  • Production Focused: Dedicated modules on MLOps, CI/CD, and deploying models to the real world.
Explore the Roadmap

About this Newsletter

TDS Daily

Each day, we bring you a fresh mix of trending topics, practical tutorials, and thought-provoking reads from across the data-science landscape. Whether you're exploring machine learning, AI, or data engineering, you'll find something to spark new ideas and keep you ahead of the curve.

AI and Data Scientist Roadmap

Mastering the transition from data to intelligence requires a clear path through the noise of modern AI. This roadmap provides a  step-by-step guide to evolving from a traditional data analyst into a high-impact AI Data Scientist.

-

Complete Lifecycle: Covers everything from foundational math and Python to advanced Deep Learning.

-

Modern AI Stack: Includes specialized tracks for AI Engineering and Vibe Coding.

- Production Focused: Dedicated modules on MLOps, CI/CD, and deploying models to the real world.

Explore the Roadmap (https://newsletter.towardsdatascience.com/e3t/Ctc/L2+113/d5qLSh04/VVvbkN8gVNVrW2kvQv47NGwRPW8VsNl15MTgB0N7TcW2v3gP0xW7lCdLW6lZ3l0W4hMF8J5gz7_dW6N807m3l4Ny8W1VnJcQ2l04J-V4n8qm2CFV8rW1kgPgh2n1MT-W8bBDW_59yXM2W29f2p51lpmrHN1fWdWmJmKmnW7KzzgP9lXT4sW5LCdnl2kYQPJVmm0xC7C3BWsW2b9PmW84ZKdSW3vdc9B7vd0z3W3QZNV78TgHfPW6m6K3Y68jTXKW4fTKzt2N-2-8W4bfLQj5rm-TcN6zWhgTY2pmTW8MjsTK5yyWfTW2hd9J74tmB9zW4mn5D619FzHvW4Cbcpr77nS6mW5lWsTv8mNkQVW1Rc_9G7cqKJgf7Z3fZl04 )
